title: 400 People Danced Until They Died...
description: In 1518, a dancing plague consumed Strasbourg—victims danced for weeks without stopping until their hearts gave out. Subscribe to the Department archive.

youtube_metadata.shorts_title: Case 1518: The Dancing Plague That Killed 400...
youtube_metadata.shorts_caption: Department archives reveal the Strasbourg incident where citizens danced themselves to death. The city's cure made it worse. Subscribe for more classified cases.

tiktok_metadata.video_caption: 400 people literally danced themselves to death in 1518 Strasbourg. The city built stages and hired musicians to help them continue. #horror #mystery #truecrime #unexplained #historical

instagram_metadata.reels_caption: What if you couldn't stop dancing? In 1518, hundreds of people danced for weeks without rest until their hearts stopped. The authorities thought more dancing would cure them. #horror #mystery #truecrime #unexplained #historical #plague #strasbourg

facebook_metadata.reels_caption: In 1518, 400 people danced themselves to death in the streets of Strasbourg. The city's solution was to build them stages and hire musicians.

x_twitter_metadata.main_tweet: The cure for the dancing plague of 1518 was more dancing. 400 people danced until their hearts stopped. #horror #mystery #truecrime
